query:
INSERT INTO workspace_tasks (workspace_id, title, status, priority, due_date, notes) VALUES
(1, 'Finalize Motion to Compel — Draft legal arguments for FINRA portal submission', 'pending', 'high', '2026-07-17', 'Focus on the Liquidation Phase (6:49 AM). The 10-second gap between cancelled and successful sell from a new IP is a clear security failure. Robinhood''s refusal to provide wallet approval and device approval records is the core of the motion.'),
(1, 'Upload Evidence Bundle to FINRA DR Portal — Submit Exhibits 1, 2, and 3', 'pending', 'high', '2026-07-17', 'Exhibits organized and PDFs ready. Must be filed alongside Motion to Compel.'),
(1, 'Prepare rebuttal for Robinhood strict liability argument (device token hash defense)', 'pending', 'high', '2026-07-20', 'Robinhood''s entire defense rests on device token hash matching. Rebuttal must address: (1) device token ≠ authorization, (2) network anomalies override token consistency, (3) IP 89.116.218.6 never appeared in any prior session.'),
(1, 'Forensic IP Analysis of Exhibit B', 'completed', 'high', '2026-07-15', 'COMPLETED 07/15/2026 — IP 89.116.218.6 and United States location tag appear ONLY on Sept 9. 100% consistency in pre-Sept 9 activity vs. Sept 9 anomalies confirmed.'),
(1, 'Extraction of High-Resolution Transaction Images from Exhibit B', 'completed', 'normal', '2026-07-15', 'COMPLETED 07/15/2026'),
(1, 'Organization of Discovery-Support Exhibits Folder', 'completed', 'normal', '2026-07-15', 'COMPLETED 07/15/2026 — Exhibits 1, 2, 3 organized.'),
(1, 'Conversion of Image Exhibits to PDF', 'completed', 'normal', '2026-07-15', 'COMPLETED 07/15/2026 — All exhibits converted and ready for portal upload.');
